title: Breakwave Weekend Read
summary:
Main
As the week comes to a close, take a moment to review the key insights from the past few days. We've gathered all the top insights for you to catch up at your convenience. Stability Brings Optimism - The VLCC market has shown signs of stabilization , particularly on Eastern routes.
